message:
Command `head -100 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | grep -n "input\|output\|m0\|apb\|slave"
echo "---"
grep -n "APB0\|APB1\|apb0\|apb1\|h0_\|slave_addr" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -30
echo "---"
# Check the compute_ss for GPIO mapping
grep -n "gpio\|GPIOA\|PADDR.*0x4000\|APB_BASE\|apb.*gpio" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | head -30` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "head -100 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | grep -n "input\|output\|m0\|apb\|slave"
echo "---"
grep -n "APB0\|APB1\|apb0\|apb1\|h0_\|slave_addr" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -30
echo "---"
# Check the compute_ss for GPIO mapping
grep -n "gpio\|GPIOA\|PADDR.*0x4000\|APB_BASE\|apb.*gpio" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | head -30"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
11:// Description: 3x AHB-Lite masters to 3x external AHB-Lite slaves plus an
12://              internal AHB-to-APB bridge feeding a 16-slave APB3 splitter.
20:	input  wire                   clk,
21:	input  wire                   rst_n,
27:	input  wire [W_ADDR-1:0]      m0_haddr,
28:	input  wire [1:0]             m0_htrans,
29:	input  wire                   m0_hwrite,
30:	input  wire [2:0]             m0_hsize,
31:	input  wire [2:0]             m0_hburst,
32:	input  wire [3:0]             m0_hprot,
33:	input  wire [W_DATA-1:0]      m0_hwdata,
34:	output wire [W_DATA-1:0]      m0_hrdata,
35:	output wire                   m0_hready,
36:	output wire                   m0_hresp,
39:	input  wire [W_ADDR-1:0]      m1_haddr,
40:	input  wire [1:0]             m1_htrans,
41:	input  wire                   m1_hwrite,
42:	input  wire [2:0]             m1_hsize,
43:	input  wire [2:0]             m1_hburst,
44:	input  wire [3:0]             m1_hprot,
45:	input  wire [W_DATA-1:0]      m1_hwdata,
46:	output wire [W_DATA-1:0]      m1_hrdata,
47:	output wire                   m1_hready,
48:	output wire                   m1_hresp,
51:	input  wire [W_ADDR-1:0]      m2_haddr,
52:	input  wire [1:0]             m2_htrans,
53:	input  wire                   m2_hwrite,
54:	input  wire [2:0]             m2_hsize,
55:	input  wire [2:0]             m2_hburst,
56:	input  wire [3:0]             m2_hprot,
57:	input  wire [W_DATA-1:0]      m2_hwdata,
58:	output wire [W_DATA-1:0]      m2_hrdata,
59:	output wire                   m2_hready,
60:	output wire                   m2_hresp,
63:	// AHB-Lite slave ports (3x)
66:	output wire [W_ADDR-1:0]      s0_haddr,
67:	output wire [1:0]             s0_htrans,
68:	output wire                   s0_hwrite,
69:	output wire [2:0]             s0_hsize,
70:	output wire [2:0]             s0_hburst,
71:	output wire [3:0]             s0_hprot,
72:	output wire [W_DATA-1:0]      s0_hwdata,
73:	output wire                   s0_hready,      // HREADY to slave
74:	input  wire                   s0_hready_resp, // HREADYOUT from slave
75:	input  wire                   s0_hresp,
76:	input  wire [W_DATA-1:0]      s0_hrdata,
79:	output wire [W_ADDR-1:0]      s1_haddr,
80:	output wire [1:0]             s1_htrans,
81:	output wire                   s1_hwrite,
82:	output wire [2:0]             s1_hsize,
83:	output wire [2:0]             s1_hburst,
84:	output wire [3:0]             s1_hprot,
85:	output wire [W_DATA-1:0]      s1_hwdata,
86:	output wire                   s1_hready,
87:	input  wire                   s1_hready_resp,
88:	input  wire                   s1_hresp,
89:	input  wire [W_DATA-1:0]      s1_hrdata,
92:	output wire [W_ADDR-1:0]      s2_haddr,
93:	output wire [1:0]             s2_htrans,
94:	output wire                   s2_hwrite,
95:	output wire [2:0]             s2_hsize,
96:	output wire [2:0]             s2_hburst,
97:	output wire [3:0]             s2_hprot,
98:	output wire [W_DATA-1:0]      s2_hwdata,
99:	output wire                   s2_hready,
100:	input  wire                   s2_hready_resp,
---
18:	parameter APB1_ENABLE = 1
117:	// APB3 slave ports (16x) - APB1
119:	output wire [16*W_PADDR-1:0]  apb1_paddr,
120:	output wire [15:0]            apb1_psel,
121:	output wire [15:0]            apb1_penable,
122:	output wire [15:0]            apb1_pwrite,
123:	output wire [16*W_DATA-1:0]   apb1_pwdata,
124:	input  wire [15:0]            apb1_pready,
125:	input  wire [16*W_DATA-1:0]   apb1_prdata,
126:	input  wire [15:0]            apb1_pslverr
130:	localparam integer N_SLAVES  = APB1_ENABLE ? 5 : 4;
133:	// APB0 window: 0x4000_0000-0x4000_FFFF
134:	// APB1 window: 0x4001_0000-0x4001_FFFF (optional)
136:		32'h4001_0000, // S4: AHB->APB1 bridge
137:		32'h4000_0000, // S3: AHB->APB0 bridge
143:		32'hFFFF_0000, // APB1: 64 KB
144:		32'hFFFF_0000, // APB0: 64 KB
273:	// APB0
274:	wire                   apb0_hready;
275:	wire                   apb0_hready_resp;
276:	wire                   apb0_hresp;
277:	wire [W_DATA-1:0]      apb0_hrdata;
279:	assign apb0_hready = x_dst_hready[3];
280:	assign x_dst_hready_resp[3] = apb0_hready_resp;
281:	assign x_dst_hresp[3]       = apb0_hresp;
282:	assign x_dst_hrdata[3*W_DATA +: W_DATA] = apb0_hrdata;
285:	// APB0 bus between bridge and splitter
286:	wire [W_PADDR-1:0]    apb0m_paddr;
287:	wire                  apb0m_psel;
288:	wire                  apb0m_penable;
---
45:    input wire [15:0] gpioa_in,
46:    output wire [15:0] gpioa_out,
47:    output wire [15:0] gpioa_oe,
48:    input wire [15:0] gpiob_in,
49:    output wire [15:0] gpiob_out,
50:    output wire [15:0] gpiob_oe,
51:    input wire [15:0] gpioc_in,
52:    output wire [15:0] gpioc_out,
53:    output wire [15:0] gpioc_oe,
89:    localparam [31:0] GPIO0_BASE_ADDR = 32'h40000000; // nc_gpio on apb0 slot 0
90:    localparam [31:0] GPIO1_BASE_ADDR = 32'h40001000; // nc_gpio on apb0 slot 1
91:    localparam [31:0] GPIO2_BASE_ADDR = 32'h40002000; // nc_gpio on apb0 slot 2
1474:    // gpio0: nc_gpio on apb0[0]
1475:    wire [11:0] gpio0_paddr = apb_paddr[0*16 +: 12];
1476:    wire        gpio0_psel = apb_psel[0];
1477:    wire        gpio0_penable = apb_penable[0];
1478:    wire        gpio0_pwrite = apb_pwrite[0];
1479:    wire [31:0] gpio0_pwdata = apb_pwdata[0*32 +: 32];
1480:    wire [31:0] gpio0_prdata;
1481:    wire        gpio0_pready;
1482:    wire        gpio0_pslverr;
1483:    wire [15:0] gpio0_gpio_out;
1484:    wire [15:0] gpio0_gpio_oe;
1485:    wire [255:0] gpio0_af_in;
1486:    wire [255:0] gpio0_af_out;
1487:    wire [255:0] gpio0_af_oe;
1488:    wire [15:0] gpio0_gpio_in = gpioa_in;
1489:    assign gpioa_out = gpio0_gpio_out[15:0];
1490:    assign gpioa_oe  = gpio0_gpio_oe[15:0];
1491:    wire gpio0_irq;

extras.command:
head -100 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | grep -n "input\|output\|m0\|apb\|slave"
echo "---"
grep -n "APB0\|APB1\|apb0\|apb1\|h0_\|slave_addr" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/nc_mcu_fabric.v | head -30
echo "---"
# Check the compute_ss for GPIO mapping
grep -n "gpio\|GPIOA\|PADDR.*0x4000\|APB_BASE\|apb.*gpio" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v | head -30
